title: Implement deterministic recorder and visibility detection (P0)

environment.os: Windows local; clean-checkout GitHub Actions pending

scenarios.scenario: The independent recorder witnesses the required fictional submission request
A known required recorder gap cannot become a clean result

visualEvidence.rationale: Source-bound optimized-production recorder reports, screenshots, and sanitized paired browser traces are pending the implementation source commit and clean-checkout CI.

proofs.description: Versioned browser-CDP recorder, canonical observations and hashes, minimized request-field summaries, response metadata, storage diffs, masked screenshots, capture gaps, and required visibility evaluation
Strict P0 configuration, URL minimization, canonical ordering, authorized-field hashing, report integrity, and visibility examples
Seeded PROP-22 ordering/hash determinism and PROP-05 required-gap classification invariants
Real isolated Chromium CDP, request/response, storage, screenshot, service-worker, opaque-body, optional-field, and forced-gap coverage
Independent required-request observation workflow tagged RUN-02, FR-031, and FR-035
Known required capture-gap workflow tagged RUN-02, FR-031, FR-035, and PROP-05
Real isolated Chromium, independent fixture oracle, recorder finalization, Playwright trace, screenshot, JSON report, and capture-gap evidence bindings

knownLimitations: RUN-02 P0 records browser-visible facts through an independent CDP session; it does not claim visibility into traffic outside the isolated browser or plaintext semantics that the browser itself cannot inspect.
FR-038 proxy capture is the explicit P1 follow-on. The P0 schema accepts only BROWSER_CDP and cannot mislabel a browser report as proxy evidence.
RUN-03 still owns the GPT-5.6 computer-use lane; model output cannot create or replace any RUN-02 observation or visibility decision.
Authorized request values and all storage values persist only as SHA-256 digests; raw request bodies, headers, cookies, query values, fragments, and configured secrets are absent from recorder JSON.
All exercised identities, values, hosts, and capture gaps are controlled fictional fixtures; a visible run is not a safety, compliance, agreement-conformity, or product-effectiveness conclusion.
